subject: Sports
title: WNBA: Women's Professional Basketball
description: Learn WNBA: Women's Professional Basketball in one minute.

hook.text: The best women's basketball league in the world has been fighting for recognition since 1996.

buildup.text: The WNBA launched in 1997 with eight teams, backed by the NBA's infrastructure and resources.

discovery.text: Stars like Lisa Leslie, Diana Taurasi, and Breanna Stewart showcased elite skill that rivaled any sport.

twist.text: WNBA players earned a fraction of NBA salaries. Many played overseas in the offseason just to make a living.

climax.text: Caitlin Clark's 2024 arrival shattered viewership records, proving the demand for women's basketball is real.

punchline.text: The talent was always there. The audience finally showed up.
